name: codex-token-saver
description: Translate prompts in any language into English before Codex CLI runs, then translate final answers back.

interface.shortDescription: Translate multilingual prompts to reduce Codex token use
interface.longDescription: A safe Codex CLI wrapper that translates prompts in any natural language to English using a cheap model, runs Codex unchanged, and translates final answers back.
defaultPrompt: Run Codex with translated multilingual prompts
Estimate token savings for a multilingual prompt
Check whether Token Saver is configured
